title: lablab vulgaris
intro: Lablab vulgaris, also known as hyacinth bean or dolichos bean, is a type of plant that belongs to the legume family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Lablab vulgaris include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and act as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of Lablab vulgaris include teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
